# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official multi-stage build base image
FROM alpine:latest AS builder

# Install dependencies for web server, API server, database, and Redis
RUN apk add --no-cache nginx openjdk11 postgresql-client redis

# Copy configurations for each service (assuming config files are in the current directory)
COPY webserver.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
COPY api-server.jar /app/api-server.jar
COPY db-init.sql /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/
COPY redis.conf /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf

# Expose all necessary ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Define the startup commands for each service
CMD ["sh", "-c", "nginx & java -jar /app/api-server.jar & docker-entrypoint.sh postgres & redis-server /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf"]
